description: Extract the financial indemnity breakdown from totals/reserves sections of the loss adjuster report. This is usually found under headings such as Totals and Reserves, Total CBE and Reserves, Total Current, or similar totals/reserve sections. Identify values for Property Damage, Stock, and Business Interruption. Map PD to Property Damage. Map BI to Business Interruption. Keep Stock as Stock. Ignore words like Net and CBE in the returned labels, but still extract the correct financial amount. Return the result as a list containing one dictionary, where keys are normalized labels and values are currency+amount strings.
